query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A close-up, overhead view of overlapping angular segments arranged in diagonal rows across a rough, textured surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Overlapping angular segments arranged in diagonal rows across a rough textured surface, nearly obliterated by extreme underexposure and crushed shadows; heavy noise, muted desaturated tones, and oppressive low contrast smear the visible detail into ambiguity, creating a suffocating atmosphere of obscurity and unease.
